page: Microsoft Azure M96bds_v3 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, virtualized via Microsoft Hyper-V. It features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8473C processor with 48 physical cores and 96 vCPUs running at 4.0 GHz. The processor includes 105 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for deep learning operations. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 410 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. No GPUs are included in this configuration.

Benchmark data reveals top-tier memory performance, with uncached read memory bandwidth reaching 429.08 GB/sec and write bandwidth at 184.62 GB/sec. Multi-threaded performance is strong, as evidenced by a top-tier Geekbench multi-core score of 20551.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 97410.84. Single-core stress-ng CPU performance is in the average tier, indicating that the server's strength lies in parallelized execution rather than single-threaded speed. Database operations and Redis SET operations both achieve top-tier rankings, with Redis handling 118.21 million operations per second.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the M96bds_v3 offers high resource density for memory-bound workloads without the added expense of GPU hardware. The primary tradeoff is the lack of hardware acceleration for graphics or massive parallel AI training, though the onboard Intel AMX instructions provide strong CPU-based LLM inference capabilities, processing 249.96 tokens per second on medium 7B models. This server is optimized for large-scale database deployments, memory-intensive enterprise applications, multi-threaded software compilation, and high-throughput static web serving.
description: Microsoft Azure M96bds_v3 is an x86_64 server in the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by a dedicated 96-vCPU Intel Xeon 8473C processor running at 4.0 GHz with 768.0 GB of RAM and 410 GB of local storage. Virtualized via Microsoft Hyper-V, it features advanced instruction sets like Intel AMX and AVX-512. Benchmarks show top-tier memory bandwidth, multi-core processing, and database performance, with Redis SET operations reaching 118.21 million operations per second. While single-core stress-ng performance is average, multi-threaded capabilities are highly competitive. Lacking a GPU, the server relies on Intel AMX for efficient CPU-based LLM inference. This configuration is optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large databases, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M96bds_v3 is a 96-vCPU Intel Xeon server with 768 GB RAM and 410 GB local storage, delivering top-tier memory bandwidth and multi-core performance for databases and enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M96bds_v3 is a 96-vCPU Intel Xeon server with 768 GB RAM, optimized for memory-intensive databases and multi-threaded workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized server featuring ninety-six virtual cores, advanced matrix extensions, and top-tier memory bandwidth for enterprise database workloads.

768.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core
410 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier memory bandwidth and multi-threaded database performance
